---
title: "Blog"
---

_____________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________


```{=html}
<div  style="margin: 30px; text-align: center;">
<a class="btn btn-primary" href="https://github.com/theAfricanQuant/theAfricanQuant.github.io" role="button" target="_blank" style="padding: 15px 30px;">View the template for this on my github repo</a>
</div>
